pkgmetadata.longdescription: Sender------Sender is easy.. code python from sender import Mail mail Mail() mail.send_message(Hello, fromaddrfromexample.com, totoexample.com, bodyHello world)Install.. code bash pip install senderLinks documentation httpsender.readthedocs.org_ github httpsgithub.comfengspsender_ development version httpgithub.comfengspsenderzipballmastereggsender-dev_
